description:
A utility for physical drive inspection and destructive whole-device media operations.

HDD Low Level Format Tool is a utility for inspecting physical drives and performing destructive whole-device media operations. It supports NVMe, SATA, IDE, SCSI, SAS, USB, and FireWire devices. Features include full-device read verification, zero-write low-level formatting, whole-device TRIM or discard operations, device identity and health information, and exportable operation logs.
